title: Railway RRB Technician CEN 02/2025 Result 2026
short_info: Indian Railway Railway Recruitment Board RRB Technician CEN 02/2025. Those candidates who are Enrolled with RRB Technician CEN 02/2025 Exam Can Check the Exam Date. Read the notification for RRB Technician Grade I and Grade III eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information. WhatsApp Join Now Telegram Join Now Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) Railway RRB Technician Recruitment 2025 RRB Advt No. CEN 02/2025 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 500/- SC / ST : 250/- PH (Divyang) : 250/- After Appear the Stage I Exam UR/OBC/EWS Fee Refund : 400/- SC / ST / PH / Female Refund : 250/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Railway RRB Technician
qualification: Read the Notification. Technical Grade 3 Open Line 6055 Class 10th with ITI Certificate from NCVT / SCVT in Related Trade / Branch. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification. How to Fill Railway RRB Technician Recruitment Online Form 2025 Railway RRB Technician Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 28/06/2025 to 07/08/2025 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Railway RRB Technician Recruitment 2025. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form. Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Railway RRB Technician Exam 2025 Notification Before Apply Online Download Mobile Apps for Latest Updates Android Apps Apple IOS Apps Some Useful

tables.table_name: Railway RRB Technician Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2025 Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 30 Years for Technician Grade III Maximum Age: 33 Years for Technician Grade I Signal Age Relaxation Extra as per Railway RRB Technician CEN 02/2025 Recruitment Rules.
rows: Bachelor Degree of Science in Physics / Electronics / Computer Science / Information Technology / Instrumentation OR B.SC in a Combination of Any Sub Stream of Physics / Electronics / Computer Science / IT / Instrumentation OR BE / B.Tech / 3 Year Engineering Polytechnic Diploma in Above Basic Stream.
